query: SELECT name, LENGTH(flightInfo) as info_length, SUBSTRING(flightInfo, 1, 200) as info_sample FROM island_guides WHERE flightInfo IS NOT NULL AND flightInfo != '' LIMIT 3
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT name, LENGTH(flightInfo) as info_length, SUBSTRING(flightInfo, 1, 200) as info_sample FROM island_guides WHERE flightInfo IS NOT NULL AND flightInfo != '' LIMIT 3

rows.name: Malé
